data.title: Former Fed chairs Bernanke and Yellen urge Supreme Court to overturn Trump’s global tariffs
data.description:
Former Federal Reserve bosses Ben Bernanke and Janet Yellen just told the Supreme Court to throw out most of Trump’s global tariffs. And they didn’t hold back. In a sharp, 600-word amicus brief filed last Friday, they called the tariffs economically meaningless and legally baseless. They were joined by nearly 50 other economists who spanned […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bernanke-yellen-scotus-trump-tariffs/

data.title: Crypto Biz: Bitcoin whales trade keys for comfort
data.description:
Early BTC whales shift to ETFs, giving up keys for TradFi perks, as BlackRock conversions rise and onchain self-custody breaks a 15-year uptrend.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-biz-bitcoin-whales-trade-keys-for-comfort?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fcb%3Dx51v04%26vfff%3D1761336274%26r%3Dx51v04%26ttt%3D1761336274355&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump selects crypto-savvy Michael Selig for CFTC chair role, appeasing the Winklevosses
data.description:
President Donald Trump has chosen Michael Selig to head the CFTC, replacing his earlier pick Brian Quintenz, whose nomination collapsed under pressure from Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, owners of crypto platform Gemini. Selig, who currently serves as chief counsel for the SEC’s crypto task force, has spent recent years working alongside SEC Chairman Paul Atkins, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-picks-michael-selig-for-cftc-chair/

data.title: Payment processor Zelle taps stablecoins for cross-border payments
data.description:
Zelle will use stablecoins for faster cross-border money transfers. The recently passed GENIUS Act in the US gives clear rules, fueling Zelle’s global innovation push. Major US banks are backing Zelle’s blockchain-based cross-border network
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/payment-processor-zelle-taps-stablecoins-for-cross-border-payments/

data.title: US seeks to seize crypto assets of Russian BTC-e exchange
data.description:
U. S. authorities have filed a motion aiming to take hold of the coins held in the wallets of the once-largest Russian cryptocurrency exchange, BTC-e. America’s justice department hopes to forfeit the digital money of the trading platform, which processed funds originating from all sorts of criminal activities. DOJ wants BTC-e’s cryptocurrency The U. S. Department of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-seeks-to-seize-crypto-assets-of-russian-btc-e-exchange/

Open your Binance Wallet and head to the Markets tab to discover and trade seamlessly […]

data.title: Michael Selig Appointed as CFTC Chair Amid Crypto Industry Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has appointed Michael Selig as the new chairman of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) in response to the growing cryptocurrency industry.

Michael Selig previously served as the chief advisor for the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) cryptocurrency task force. He was also a partner in the asset management practice at the law firm Willkie Farr & Gallagher.

data.title: Peter Schiff challenges CZ to debate on Bitcoin and tokenized gold
data.description: Economist and cryptocurrency critic Peter Schiff challenged Binance founder CZ to a public debate on the X platform, titled "Bitcoin vs. Tokenized Gold." Schiff explained that the debate would focus on "which asset best fulfills the three requirements of money: medium of exchange, unit of account, and store of value."

data.title: Tether launches synthetic AI dataset to democratize STEM intelligence
data.description:
Tether Data’s AI research division, QuantumVerse Automatic Computer (QVAC), has launched QVAC Genesis I, a large-scale synthetic dataset designed for advanced AI training and language models, especially those focused on STEM domains. QVAC Genesis I has been built from 41 billion text tokens. It’s purpose-built to support the creation of language models that can reason, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-launches-synthetic-ai-dataset-to-democratize-stem-intelligence/

data.title: S&P 500 earnings next week enjoy upgrade tailwind, with EPS estimates up over 13%
data.description:
More than a dozen S&P 500 companies are heading into next week’s earnings reports with earnings-per-share forecasts that have been raised sharply in recent months. The third-quarter earnings season, which began in early October, is showing cumulative profit growth of more than 13% for the period ending September 30. If confirmed when results are released, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sp-500-earnings-next-week/

data.title: Insider whale-linked accounts once bet on CZ's amnesty on Polymarket
data.description: YouTuber and investigative journalist Coffeezilla reported that a Hyperliquid 100% win rate whale, who shorted the market based on Trump's tweets and profited approximately $190 million, had been linked to the Polymarket account "bigwinner01," which had previously bet on CZ receiving a presidential pardon. Coffeezilla noted that the timing of this operation closely coincided with related events, suggesting insider trading.
